name: @meanwhile-together/template-org
description: Canonical org-host scaffold for `mtx create org`. Ships the config triad (config/org.json + config/server.json + example backend/deploy configs), sibling `../payload-admin` wiring (no bundled payloads/admin tree), and the shared deploy surface (targets/, terraform/, railpack). Railway install/build live in MTX (`project/` + `Dockerfile.org-host`); preDeploy uses `node scripts/railway-migrate.mjs` (from project-bridge, copied by `prepare:railway` / `mtx build server`). `mtx create org` copies the canonical Dockerfile.
